title: Nudelwurst
description: A Create Centered Fabric Modpack. Includes Create, Valkyrien Skies and various quality of life and performance mods.
body:
A Create Centered Fabric Modpack. 

Includes Create and several Add-Ons, as well as various quality of life and performance mods.

All credit for the included mods goes to their respective creators. If you wish to download one of the mods for personal use, please do so using its official page.
